claimText: UC Berkeley offers an 'AI Essentials' training for employees — a approximately 30-minute course covering foundational AI concepts, UC policies regarding AI tool usage, and opportunities for application in higher education.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: UC Berkeley AI Essentials — ~30-minute employee training covering foundational AI concepts, UC policies regarding the usage of AI tools, and opportunities for application in higher ed. Authentication required.

citation.citationTitle: Guidance on the use of AI | Berkeley AI Hub
